universe_policy.selector_description: Caller-specified ticker list (QueryContext.universe/targets); FinRL's own StockPortfolioEnv/DRLAgent perform no asset selection of their own in this adapter path — selection happens upstream of this call (contrast with finrl_x_adapter.py's separate ML-bucket top-25% selection capability).

observation_policy.observation_description: Upstream StockPortfolioEnv's real observation state: per-ticker OHLCV-derived technical indicators (macd, boll_ub, boll_lb, rsi_30, cci_30, dx_30, close_30_sma, close_60_sma) plus a real rolling 60-trading-day return-covariance matrix (adapter-side glue required by StockPortfolioEnv's own input contract, not upstream decision logic — see module header).

decision_policy.decision_rule: Trained A2C policy's continuous action vector, passed through upstream's own StockPortfolioEnv.softmax_normalization() to yield real non-negative portfolio weights summing to ~1.0 across the given tickers.
decision_policy.output_semantics: target_weights: continuous allocation across tickers (post-softmax, non-negative, sums to ~1.0); no explicit cash weight in the model's action space.

update_policy.update_description: Each q4_policy call retrains a fresh upstream A2C policy from scratch (DRLAgent.train_model(), real stable_baselines3.A2C) over the supplied generation_window; no trained-model state is carried between calls other than the optional saved artifact reference.

artifact.description: Trained upstream stable_baselines3.A2C model (FinRL's own DRLAgent), 3000 timesteps over generation_window [2022-07-01, 2024-01-15] for tickers ['AAPL', 'MSFT', 'NVDA']. Saved via SB3's own model.save(); the v1 adapter discarded this model entirely after weight extraction.

q4.explanation: initial_weights are the final-day allocation from a real A2C policy (upstream FinRL's own DRLAgent wrapping stable_baselines3.A2C), trained live for 3000 timesteps on AAPL, MSFT, NVDA's real yfinance history over the harness-supplied generation_window [2022-07-01, 2024-01-15] (upstream's own StockPortfolioEnv reward = portfolio value; upstream's own softmax weight normalization proves non-negativity/sum-to-1 — no pretrained checkpoint was available or used, matching upstream's normal usage pattern).
